analysisTarget: Conditional Rendering Decision Points Causing Premature Error Display

errorConditionCheck.intention: Show error when specific page not found after loading complete
errorConditionCheck.actualBehavior: Shows error prematurely while API calls are still in progress
errorConditionCheck.triggerTiming: T+30ms - before API completion at T+200ms
errorConditionCheck.rootCause: loading state from wrapper component doesn't cover pages API loading

noPagesFallback.intention: Show 'create first page' UI when no pages exist
noPagesFallback.actualBehavior: Shows during loading window when pages array empty
noPagesFallback.rootCause: No check for loading state or initialPageId context
noPagesFallback.code:
) : pages.length === 0 ? (

No pages yet

loadingStateCheck.intention: Show loading spinner when fetching pages
loadingStateCheck.actualBehavior: Only shows when both conditions true simultaneously
loadingStateCheck.triggerTiming: Brief window when loading=true AND pages=[]
loadingStateCheck.issue: Loading state resets to false before pages populate

specificPageDisplay.intention: Display specific page when accessed via URL
specificPageDisplay.actualBehavior: Never triggers because selectedPage not set
specificPageDisplay.rootCause: useEffect setting selectedPage runs after error condition
specificPageDisplay.code:
{initialPageId && selectedPage ? (

{selectedPage.title}

{pageRenderer.renderJsonPage(selectedPage.content)}
specificPageDisplay.issue: Dependency on selectedPage which is never set due to race condition

expectedFlow: 2. Show loading state while fetching pages
actualFlow: 5. API completes later but error already displayed
logicFlowAnalysis.breakPoint: Step 2-3: Logic evaluation happens before API completion
logicFlowAnalysis.missingLogic: Proper loading state management for individual operations

!loading.source: Wrapper component loading, not pages loading

booleanLogicBreakdown.incorrectTrigger: All conditions met during API loading window
booleanLogicBreakdown.fix: Change loading reference to pages-specific loading state

loadingStateConfusion.issue: Multiple loading states not properly isolated
loadingStateConfusion.wrapperLoading: Controls agent data fetch in AgentDynamicPageWrapper
loadingStateConfusion.pageLoading: Controls pages data fetch in AgentDynamicPage
loadingStateConfusion.currentProblem: useEffect checks wrapper loading for pages operation
loadingStateConfusion.solution: Separate loading states for each async operation

pagesArrayTiming.issue: pages array starts empty and stays empty during API call
pagesArrayTiming.problem: Boolean logic evaluates during empty state

selectedPageState.issue: selectedPage never gets set due to race condition
selectedPageState.trigger: Fires multiple times but page lookup fails
selectedPageState.result: selectedPage remains null, specific page view never shows

errorConditionFix.reasoning: Only show error when not looking for specific page AND not loading

noPagesFallbackFix.reasoning: Only show 'create first page' when not loading and not looking for specific page

loadingStateFix.reasoning: Show loading for pages API OR when looking for specific page

specificPageFix.reasoning: Show loading while searching for specific page

missingTestCases: Test conditional rendering during API loading window
Test boolean logic evaluation with different state combinations
Test loading state transitions and their effect on rendering
Test specific page lookup with various timing scenarios
booleanLogicTests: Test compound conditions with mock state values
Test state transitions during async operations
Test edge cases where multiple conditions change simultaneously
renderingStateTests: Test component renders correct UI for each state combination
Test error states vs loading states
Test fallback UI vs specific content display

problemPattern.failure: UI decisions made before async operations complete

preventionPattern.approach: separate loading states for each operation
preventionPattern.implementation: loading flags specific to operation scope
preventionPattern.testing: mock timing scenarios for all condition combinations

architecturalPattern.current: single loading state for multiple operations
architecturalPattern.advanced: state machine for complex async flows

conditionalRenderingChecks: Do all conditions account for loading states?
Are loading states scoped to specific operations?
Do compound conditions handle partial state updates?
Are error conditions distinguished from loading conditions?
asyncStateManagementChecks: Is each async operation tracked independently?
Do useEffect dependencies include all relevant state?
Are there race conditions between state updates?
Do conditional renders handle intermediate states?
userExperienceChecks: Do users see appropriate loading indicators?
Are error messages shown at the right time?
Is the UI responsive during async operations?
Are fallback states clearly differentiated from errors?
